channel.title: 2026-02-24 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-02-24 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Emulating 2D Materials with Magnons
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Bobby Kaman, Jinho Lim, Yingkai Liu, and Axel Hoffmann
Author(s): Bobby Kaman, Jinho Lim, Yingkai Liu, and Axel Hoffmann Patterning holes into magnetic thin films enables the emulation of electrons in 2D quantum materials and the precise control of magnon transport through topological band engineering. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 011034] Published Tue Feb 24, 2026
